command-exmod-desc-client: Exlib client-side base command (.exmod). Has only network highlighting on its own; other mods extend it with their client-side options.
command-exmod-help-client: Client-side command - runs locally on your machine. Use a sub-command (see .help exmod). Available options depend on which mods are installed and what subcommands those add.
command-exmod-desc-server: Exlib server-side base command (/exmod). A shared root other mods extend with their server-side options.
command-exmod-help-server: Server-side command - runs on the world host. Use a sub-command (see /help exmod). Available options depend on which mods are installed and what subcommands those add.
command-network-hi-desc: Highlight every network block, coloured per network
network-hi-on: Network highlighting enabled - each network has its own colour; updates live.
game:placefailure-exlib-noorientation: Cannot connect to the neighbouring blocks - no valid orientation here.
